text: The fight against Energy Transfer’s meritless lawsuit continues! We know that the law, truth, and justice are on our side. But we need your urgent support - join Greenpeace USA today & fight for our planet’s future.

As Ministers gather at UNESCO for the G7 French Presidency High-Level Policy Debate on Sustainable Education Financing, we call for ambitious commitments to address the education financing crisis.
